name: fable-advisor
description: Chiptuned throughput-first fork of DannyMac180/fable-advisor. Run your session on Claude's most capable model as a full-time architect: it writes specs and verdicts while Grok 4.5 (Grok CLI) and GPT-5.6 Sol at high reasoning (Codex) do the typing. Fable-level judgment with cross-vendor implementation, tuned for the architect's quota.

author.name: Vincent Fraillon (chiptuned) — upstream by Dan McAteer
